title: Video Call with Friends
content: Last night, I had a video call with several friends who live in different cities. We had not spoken together for months, so everyone was excited. During the call, we shared stories, showed photos, and talked about our plans. One friend introduced a new pet, and another described a recent vacation. Technology makes these conversations possible even when people are far apart. By the end of the call, we were laughing and making plans for another meeting. It felt almost like being together in person.
